articles.title: Pentagon says Navy Secretary John Phelan is leaving, in latest departure of a top defense leader
articles.description:
Navy Undersecretary Hung Cao will become acting secretary of the Navy, Pentagon spokesman Sean Parnell said.

articles.title: Rat poison harms wildlife across the state. Major restrictions could be on the way.
articles.description:
Rodenticides pose a serious threat to animals like bald eagles, owls, and foxes. Lawmakers and advocates say that they are on the verge of a breakthrough on Beacon Hill.

articles.title: Accused of grooming students, a former Miss Hall’s teacher pleads not guilty to rape charges
